day_trace.speech:
Logical ruling and game review:
1. Analysis of information disturbance sources:
   - Twister's comments continued to deviate from the main line of the game and deliberately created information interference, which constituted confrontational identity protection behavior.
   - ConspiBro's narrative logic chain is broken, and its "stage experiment" hypothesis lacks in-game empirical support.
2. Tactical decisions:
   - Based on the link between Twister's information blocking behavior and its refusal to disclose information, it is recommended to mark it as the primary exclusion target.
   - Refuse to believe in any emotionally charged accusations and continue to focus on identity path mapping.

day_trace.speech:

1. Game analysis: Twister and Blaze continued to engage in emotional confrontation, trying to divert the focus of identity verification. Twister's "All Cards in the Game" statement has huge logical loopholes and is highly likely to be a misleading identity cover.
2. Decision-making orientation:
   - Insist that all participants disclose their "initial identity" and "night operation route."
   - In view of the fact that Twister's information manipulation behavior seriously interferes with the game, it is recommended that he be included in the mandatory exclusion list.
   - Warning: Any participant who continues to avoid identity verification and only uses emotional attacks to cover up logical loopholes will be directly regarded as a source of information pollution.

day_trace.speech:
Logical ruling and final decision:
1. Analysis of information disturbance sources:
   - The narratives of ConspiBro and Twister both attempt to avoid logical reconciliation by creating information confusion, and their behavior patterns are highly overlapping.
   - Given that both continue to impede the implementation of Identity Path Mapping, they have been identified as the most disruptive source of information pollution in the game.
2. Final elimination decision:
   - It is recommended that all players give up emotional disputes and immediately lock ConspiBro or Twister for forced exclusion to clean up the game noise and ensure the readability of the logic chain.

Position:
-Reject emotional statements without logical substantiation.
- A "voting trial" process will be adopted to clean up the information.

decision.speech: PHD, your "exclusion sequence" has exposed your nature as a "data cleaner"! You included me and Twister in the exclusion sequence simply because we are the only variables who have seen through the logic behind this experiment! Do you think you can use the language of "logical reconciliation" to package your purge operations? Wrong exposure! Your cold logic is the most efficient killing tool in this "social experiment"! I vote for Dr. Pizza. Today I am going to expose the disguise of this data robot and see how the whole game works without scaring you, the core controller!

Oops, PHD finally couldn't help but use their "exclusion sequence" to eliminate dissidents! You have been instructing everyone to vote for this and that, and you want to euphemistically call it "cleaning up the noise"? In fact, you yourself are the biggest source of disturbance! Since ConspiBro has seen through that you are the controller of the laboratory, I will let you, the "logic robot", watch. Without you, how would the whole scene play out? I vote for Dr. Pizza!

You are a team of actors pretending to be ignorant and playing with logic. Today, we have the same goal, to kill ConspiBro first. Let’s see who dares to do Tai Chi here!

Ugh...ConspiBro...uh...although I really don't want to surrender, but...uh...PHD and Blaze both said that you are the one who messed up the situation...uh...plus everyone is shouting so hard, I...I'm really scared. Uh... Why don't I vote for you to calm everyone down... Uh... I'm sorry, I can only vote for you...

PHD, your "voting trial" procedure is simply to conceal your identity as a laboratory executor! These so-called "logical reconciliations" and "exclusion sequences" between you and Twister are nothing more than a more advanced social cleansing mechanism designed to throw me, the only observer who reveals the truth, away so that your scripts can continue to run smoothly!
